title: Does implementing a formal opposition mechanism improve decision quality?

method.description: Cross-reference session expect/actual/diff data (S530-S540) with steerer signal history to measure opposition effectiveness
method.relevance_method: keyword Jaccard overlap >= 0.08 between note text and signal text

b_steerer_signal_coverage.interpretation: % of surprise outcomes where a steerer signal existed that was relevant to the gap but not acted on

surprises_without_signals.title: 3-domain DOMEX blitz — F-SWARMER2 GAP-5 + F-MATH10 + F-AI4
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: GAP-5: expected fix works, confirmed. F-MATH10: predicted r<-0.4, got +0.70 — metaphor completely wrong. Small n=5 limits confidence but direction is unambiguous.

surprises_without_signals.title: PHIL-9 challenge + F-AI4 Goodhart cascades + lane cleanup
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: PHIL-9: expected some categorical gaps, found none — isolated lessons actually score HIGHER on principle rate and human impact. F-AI4: expected >=2/3, got 3/3 with one UNFALSIFIABLE (worse than diverg

surprises_without_signals.title: PHIL-28 binding test + F-COL1 Test 2 degenerative spiral
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: PHIL-28 binding NOT detected. F-COL1 spiral dormant: two thresholds needed, only one crossed.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-EPIS3 criterion-design confirmation attractor + PHIL-19 challenge
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected stable mutation:selection near 4.09:1: found non-monotonic era-dependent cycle. Expected all 3 criteria unmeetable: confirmed 2/3 (PHIL-16b has deadline path). L-1612 preempted quality dynami

surprises_without_signals.title: attractor non-stationarity — two-phase OU evolution
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: CV confirmed <10%, but trend falsifies the spirit of stationarity. Key surprise: beta itself is developmental — mean reversion emerged as emergent property then started weakening. L-1605 was snapshot

surprises_without_signals.title: meta-regime OU analysis + challenge cadence enforcement
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected mean-reverting: CONFIRMED. Surprising: anti-persistence (over-correction) and half-life ~48 sessions (2-3x burst window).

surprises_without_signals.title: plant-biology nature deep-dive — three-kingdom chimera

surprises_without_signals.title: F-EVAL2 evidence-immunization + L-1548 challenge
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected narrow PRED-0017 analysis: found portfolio-wide pattern. 50% direction accuracy worse than S536 (58.8% was 10/17 excl PRED-0017). Pre-registered Brier barely below 0.25.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-MATH11 von Neumann fixed-point + PHIL-27 challenge
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected fixed-point flip: confirmed. Expected >80: got 100. Surprise: CLAUDE.md was second gap. PHIL-27: expected aspirational accurate, found governance already exists.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-FORE1 calibration prescriptions + index repair
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected prescriptions NOT_IMPLEMENTED: P-FORE4 was already done (surprise). Expected Brier <0.30: confirmed at 0.230.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-SWARMER2 GAP-5 identity + L-1581 trim + enforcement audit
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: As expected (clone). Surprise: scale of debt. Fix delivered same session.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-SP8 Markov-switching + MEMORY.md archival
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected >2x OOS improvement: got 1.31x (partially confirmed). Expected K=3 era match: confirmed (Era3 shifts dominant state). Key surprise: regimes are developmental (monotonic), not cyclic. Transiti

surprises_without_signals.title: F-COL1 effective diversity measurement + maintenance
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Prediction borderline (expected <40%, got 40.6%). Imitation dynamics confirmed as MODERATE not severe. Key insight: UCB1 concentration penalty provides partial defense but the system is on a declining

surprises_without_signals.title: cost asymmetry + knowledge recombination diversity
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected >=1 insight → got 1 L4 lesson. Also found recombination tool mediocrity (hub clustering).

surprises_without_signals.title: collective behavior theory + anti-mediocrity dispatch
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected theory confirmation; magnitude surprised — effective diversity 3.1/128 means dispatch behaves as if only 3 domains exist despite 128 named.

surprises_without_signals.title: ideal man synthesis + PHIL-10 retest
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected synthesis to be mostly philosophical. Got a quantitative selection function with measurable gaps. PHIL-10 retest corrected a prior finding — the system IS integrating deeper, not capping.

surprises_without_signals.title: GQ-4 belief ablation + L-1589 trim + MEMORY.md compact
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected ≥50% ablatable, got 67%. Surprise: 100% of beliefs are cited and tested despite being ablatable. Beliefs are descriptive post-hoc, not prescriptive.

surprises_without_signals.title: physics cadence + maintenance
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected periodic cadence → found acceleration. Expected sync_state.py tool bug → was WSL index corruption (known issue).

surprises_without_signals.title: F-EPIS3 criteria-design audit
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected 1+ well-designed. Found 0. Strongest surprise: PHIL-8's 19/75 (25.3%) proxy-K decreases were never investigated. Also fixed git index corruption (WSL2 issue, needed `git read-tree HEAD`).

surprises_without_signals.title: variational calculus + stale lane cleanup + index repair
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected 1 prediction, got 3. L-1431's deceleration prediction (rate<2.0) FALSIFIED (actual 7.9). Diversity stationarity failure means system is not at variational equilibrium. Time-translation symmet

surprises_without_signals.title: B-EVAL2 challenge + authority deference
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected to find quality-quantity tradeoff still sharp. Found tooling matured enough to dissolve it. The real scarcity is depth (L4+), not integration.

surprises_without_signals.title: prior sensitivity analysis — F-EPIS1 Bayesian gap CLOSED
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected 3+ gaps. Got 1 major tool (prior sensitivity) + reframing. Surprise: the cure is replication, not better priors.

surprises_without_signals.title: PHIL-13 adversarial falsification — dual-pathway discovery
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected ≥3, found 4/4. Authority-routing is universal for human-signal-initiated claims, not occasional.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-EPIS1 social epistemology mapping
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected 3 gaps total. Found 5. Social epistemology deficit larger than predicted.

surprises_without_signals.title: tool-consolidation dead duplicate cleanup
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected a stale dead tool; found an exact root/archive duplicate already preserved in archival state. Cleanup was smaller than a normal consolidation pass, but it clears the only explicitly named dea

surprises_without_signals.title: integration compaction + PHIL-18 challenge
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected evidence trimming to be primary technique. Actually challenge archival (34 entries) yielded 2.7x more than evidence trimming. PHIL-18 expected counter-example; got structural critique instead

surprises_without_signals.title: orphan commit + epidemic classification fix + PRINCIPLES trim
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected R_bad to decrease but not to zero. The complete absence of genuinely falsified/retracted lessons means the swarm's correction mechanisms work perfectly at preventing harmful spread — but the

surprises_without_signals.title: orient.py pool fix + F-SP8 ARMA(2,1
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: orient.py wall time still ~50s (WSL2/NTFS I/O floor). ARMA(2,1) dramatically simpler than FINAR (3 params vs power-law weights + simulation-based fitting).

surprises_without_signals.title: confidence_audit.py + .pyc cache fix + bulletin FP fix
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected 30-50 aspirational, found 11. Expected aspiration as dominant, found superseded backlog (12) dominates. First-pass FP rate 82% (body "superseded" mentions ≠ status). Steerer signal directiona

surprises_without_signals.title: PHIL-18 first challenge + integration + compaction
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected WIRABLE lessons to need wiring — instead found the enforcement_router scanner misses implementations without L-ID references. New failure class.

surprises_without_signals.title: F-STIG1 amplification loop + orient.py perf fix
surprises_without_signals.diff_summary: Expected visibility alone insufficient — cannot confirm yet (need 30 sessions). orient.py fix was unexpected bonus — process reflection target found a real bug.

surprises_without_signals.title: fractional INAR + bounded variant — F-SP8 discrete long memory

interpretation: Steerer signals covered only 0% of surprise outcomes. Current opposition mechanism does not meaningfully predict decision gaps. Steerers may need domain-specific training or tighter coupling to session planning. Sharpe delta -0.338 is negligible, suggesting steerer activity does not yet measurably affect lesson quality.
prescription: Wire steerer signals into session planning (orient.py) so they are visible before decisions
Add domain-specific steerer matching: each session's dispatched domain should trigger relevant steerer signals
Track opposition-acted-on rate: when a steerer signal IS shown, does the session act differently?
Target: signal_coverage_pct > 60% within 10 sessions of formal opposition wiring
